name: What's my construction injury case worth if I can't work in Saint George?
description: Medical + lost wages + pain; third-party > workers' comp.[5][2]

mainEntity.name: What's my construction injury case worth if I can't work in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + lost wages + pain; third-party > workers' comp.[5][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Value depends on medical bills, lost wages, pain, and fault—often $100K+ for serious cases.** Utah damages include economic (bills, income) and non-economic (pain) losses.[5] Key factors: (1) Permanent disability boosts value; (2) third-party suits recover more than workers' comp; (3) comparative fault reduces award; (4) wrongful death adds lost future income.[2][3] Gather all records, calculate projections, and negotiate with a lawyer. Free consultations estimate realistic settlements without lowballing.
